title: Onboarding - Continue as guest
scenario: Onboarding 'Continue as guest' flow skips location permission and passcode prompts on Android compared to iOS
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on an Android device.
2. On the onboarding screen, tap 'Continue as guest'.
3. When prompted, select either 'Allow' or 'Don't Allow' for the relevant permission.
4. Observe the next screen that appears.
expected: After tapping 'Continue as guest' and selecting 'Allow' or 'Don't Allow', the Poly Product Improvement Program popup appears, and the user is directed to the Home screen.
